title: pelargonium gussonei
intro: Pelargonium gussonei, also known as the Rosy Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of rosmarinic acid. The health benefits of Pelargonium gussonei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium gussonei can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
